items.a: Yes. Your data is encrypted in transit and at rest on AWS servers. We comply with GDPR, CCPA, and LGPD. No ads, no tracking, no data selling. Ever.

items.q: How does the AI receipt scanner work?
items.a: Take a photo of any receipt. Our AI extracts the total, each line item, discounts, taxes, merchant name, and even the currency — automatically. You review and confirm.

items.q: Can I use it for trips with friends?
items.a: Yes. Use "Expense Split" mode for trips — each person pays with their own money, and HomePot calculates who owes whom at the end, minimizing the number of transfers.
Free plan: 1 group, 20 expenses/month, 10 AI scans/month, multi-currency, no ads. Pro: unlimited everything from €2.92/month (annual). That's 15x less than a coffee per day.

items.q: How does HomePot compare to Splitwise?
items.a: HomePot is built as an honest, ad-free alternative: 52 currencies for expense entry, AI receipt scanning that reads any currency from receipts, and a transparent subscription model. See the full side-by-side comparison with Splitwise for every feature and a disclaimer about our sources.

splitwise.title: HomePot vs Splitwise — honest comparison (2026)
splitwise.description: Looking for a Splitwise alternative? HomePot supports 52 currencies, AI receipt scanning that reads any currency, and zero ads. See the full side-by-side comparison with sources.
splitwise.h1: HomePot vs Splitwise — the honest comparison
splitwise.intro: Splitwise has been the default way to split shared expenses for over a decade. Both HomePot and Splitwise have a free tier and a paid Pro tier, so a fair comparison must show what each plan actually gives you. Here's the honest breakdown — and the short version is that most of what Splitwise reserves for Pro, HomePot includes for free. Every row below links to a public source so you can verify it yourself.
splitwise.table_subtitle: Each cell states which plan tier the feature is available on. A checkmark means unrestricted for all users; text means there's a specific tier or limit.

features.label: AI receipt scanner
features.ours: Free (monthly scan limit) · Unlimited on Pro

features.label: Fixed vs variable split modes in the same group
AI reads any currency from the receipt image
Expenses per month
features.ours: 20 free (no daily cap — batch them any day) · Unlimited on Pro
features.theirs: Daily cap applies — see Splitwise Pro page

features.label: Groups
features.ours: 1 free household group · Unlimited on Pro

differentiators.title: AI reads every line of the receipt
differentiators.desc: Our scanner doesn't stop at the total. It extracts each item, tax, discount, and tip so you can split a restaurant bill exactly the way the group consumed it — not by a forced even share.

differentiators.title: 52 currencies + AI reads any receipt
differentiators.desc: 52 currencies supported for expense entry, covering Europe, the Americas, Asia, the Middle East, Oceania and Africa. The AI scanner goes further and detects any ISO 4217 currency from the receipt image, then auto-converts to your group's base currency at live exchange rates.

differentiators.title: Zero ads, zero trackers — forever
differentiators.desc: We make money from optional subscriptions, not from your attention or your data. No interstitial ads, no cooldown timers, no third-party analytics SDKs. This is a written, verifiable policy — not a marketing tagline.

differentiators.title: Fixed vs variable split in the same group
differentiators.desc: Rent, internet and insurance split evenly between everyone. Dinner and groceries split only between the people who were there. HomePot models both cases natively in the same group — no workarounds, no separate spreadsheets.

differentiators.title: Monthly close with minimum transfers
differentiators.desc: At the end of the month, HomePot computes the smallest set of transfers needed to bring every balance back to zero. Instead of chains of small payments between many people, you get one or two clean settlements and the month is closed.

differentiators.title: Real privacy, documented in plain language
differentiators.desc: A public GDPR-compliant policy, data hosted on AWS EU, one-tap account and data deletion from Settings. Nothing hidden in fine print and nothing sold to data brokers.

splitwise.reviews_title: What Splitwise users say in public reviews
splitwise.reviews_subtitle: Real verbatim quotes from the Splitwise iOS App Store listing (overall rating 3.9 / 5 at time of writing).

reviews.quote: I had to wait for ad to play... then after I added 4 expenses I was met with a pop-up saying that I had reached the maximum number of expenses I could input today
reviews.author: Julia Ruth

reviews.quote: This app now bombards you with (timed) ads for premium... roping me into a subscription for that essentially offline functionality leaves a bad taste
reviews.author: Nanospork

reviews.quote: I'm capped at 5 submissions a day and then demanded to sign up for PRO... I need to get PRO to convert requests before paying them
reviews.author: alex x3

faq.q: Can I import my Splitwise data into HomePot?
faq.a: CSV import is on our roadmap. In the meantime you can export your Splitwise group as CSV and a HomePot importer will land soon. Write to homepotapp@gmail.com and we'll notify you the day it ships.

Yes. The free plan includes 1 group, 20 expenses per month, 10 AI receipt scans, multi-currency, and zero ads — forever. Pro starts at €2.92/month on annual billing and removes the limits, plus adds unlimited groups, exports and advanced analytics.

faq.q: What exactly do I get on HomePot's free tier, without paying?
faq.a: A free HomePot account gives you: 1 group with unlimited members, 20 expenses per month, a limited number of AI receipt scans per month, receipt photo uploads, the full 52-currency picker, charts and spending analytics, recurring expenses, fixed and variable splitting in the same group, the monthly close with minimum-transfer settlement, dark mode, and zero ads. Pro mainly removes the group/expense/scan limits and adds CSV/PDF export for your stats.

faq.q: How does HomePot make money if there are no ads?
faq.a: Optional subscriptions. Pro is €2.92/month on annual billing — less than a coffee per month. That's the only revenue model. No ads, no data selling, no affiliate placements inside the app.

faq.q: How many currencies does HomePot really support?
faq.a: 52 currencies are selectable from the picker for expense entry, covering Europe, the Americas, Asia, the Middle East, Oceania and Africa. On top of that, the AI receipt scanner detects any ISO 4217 currency directly from the receipt image — so even if your group's base currency is outside the 52, you can still scan a receipt anywhere in the world and see it auto-converted.

Yes. We comply with GDPR (EU), CCPA (California), and LGPD (Brazil). Data is hosted on AWS in the EU, encrypted at rest and in transit. Complete account and data deletion is available in one tap from the Settings screen.

faq.q: Are the facts about Splitwise on this page up to date?
faq.a: All Splitwise claims on this page are taken from their public website (splitwise.com/pro) and the Splitwise iOS App Store listing at the time of writing. Please verify current pricing and features on those sources, since they can change. HomePot is not affiliated with Splitwise, Inc. and the comparison is our own opinion based on publicly available information.
